# Power Star Apps

> Power Star Apps is a mobile app development company creating practical Android applications used by millions worldwide. Our apps focus on everyday utility tools for temperature monitoring, audio recording, voice transformation, device personalization, and AI-powered photo editing.

## Company Overview

- **Founded:** 2017
- **Location:** Wuhan, China
- **Platform:** Android (Google Play)
- **Total Downloads:** 6M+ across all apps
- **Average Rating:** 4.0+
- **Markets:** 100+ countries

## Products

### Thermometer - Hygrometer

A temperature monitoring app that provides real-time weather data, humidity readings, and barometric pressure information.

- **Package ID:** com.firefly.thermometer
- **Downloads:** 1M+
- **Rating:** 3.8 (10.9K reviews)
- **Category:** Weather
- **Key Features:**
  - Real-time temperature monitoring
  - Hygrometer for humidity percentage
  - Barometer for air pressure
  - Discomfort index display
  - GPS-based location weather

**Use Cases:** Outdoor activities, fishing (barometer), health monitoring (humidity), weather planning

**Google Play:** https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.firefly.thermometer

---

### Microphone - Voice Amplifier

A voice amplification app that turns Android devices into wireless microphones with noise reduction capabilities.

- **Package ID:** com.microphone.bbmic.lite
- **Downloads:** 5M+
- **Rating:** 3.3 (21.7K reviews)
- **Category:** Medical / Tools
- **Key Features:**
  - Live voice amplification
  - Bluetooth microphone support
  - Noise reduction technology
  - Background play mode
  - Built-in audio recorder
  - Multiple microphone styles

**Use Cases:** Presentations, teaching, meetings, tour guiding, hearing assistance, audio recording

**Google Play:** https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.microphone.bbmic.lite

---

### Voice Changer - AI Voice Change

An AI-powered voice transformation app with real-time effects and text-to-speech capabilities.

- **Package ID:** com.lixiangdong.voicechange
- **Downloads:** 10K+
- **Category:** Productivity
- **Key Features:**
  - 100+ voice effects
  - AI voice changer
  - Text-to-speech (TTS)
  - Video voice modification
  - Audio file processing
  - Real-time voice transformation

**Use Cases:** Content creation, gaming voice chat, social media, podcasts, audiobooks, prank calls

**Google Play:** https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lixiangdong.voicechange

---

### Lumiwall - Wallpapers HD

A wallpaper app offering 4K HD backgrounds with live and 3D effects for Android device personalization.

- **Package ID:** com.lixiangdong.lumiwall
- **Downloads:** 100+
- **Category:** Personalization
- **Key Features:**
  - 4K & HD quality wallpapers
  - Live and 3D wallpapers
  - Daily automatic updates
  - Custom photo import
  - Smart category search
  - Multiple display size support

**Categories:** Nature, abstract, anime, earth, minimalist, colors

**Google Play:** https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lixiangdong.lumiwall

---

### AI Photo & Video Filters

An AI-powered photo and video editor with 34+ intelligent filters for creative content transformation.

- **Package ID:** com.lixiangdong.aiphoto
- **Downloads:** 100+
- **Category:** Photography
- **Key Features:**
  - 34+ AI-powered filters
  - Photo and video support
  - AI dress-up and style transformation
  - Holiday-themed filters (Christmas, Halloween, New Year)
  - Professional photography styles
  - AI picture to video converter
  - Dancing video animations

**Use Cases:** Social media content, professional photography, creative projects, avatar creation

**Google Play:** https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lixiangdong.aiphoto

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Power Star Apps?
Power Star Apps is a mobile app development company that creates practical Android applications for everyday tasks including temperature monitoring, audio recording, voice changing, wallpapers, and AI photo editing.

### Are Power Star Apps free?
Yes, all Power Star Apps are free to download with optional in-app purchases for premium features.

### What platforms do Power Star Apps support?
Power Star Apps are available exclusively on Android through Google Play Store.

### How accurate is the Thermometer app?
The Thermometer app uses GPS-based weather data from nearby weather stations. It requires internet connection and GPS to function. It does not measure indoor temperature using device sensors.

### Can I use the Microphone app for hearing assistance?
The Microphone app includes hearing amplifier functionality with noise reduction. However, it is not a certified medical hearing aid device. Consult a healthcare professional for medical hearing issues.

### Does Voice Changer work in real-time?
Yes, Voice Changer supports real-time voice transformation for gaming and calls. It also supports processing pre-recorded audio files and videos.

### What resolution are Lumiwall wallpapers?
Lumiwall offers 4K and HD quality wallpapers optimized for various screen resolutions. The app supports different display sizes.

### What AI features does AI Photo & Video Filters offer?
AI Photo & Video Filters provides 34+ AI-powered filters including dress-up transformation, holiday themes, professional photography styles, and video conversion features.

---
